goal: Create structured context prompts for each superpixel blob to guide blob-level image-to-event generation.
requirements: Each blob must receive motion context based on its semantic label.
Motion should be simple and heuristic for the MVP.
Eyes may blink or move vertically.
Mouth may open, close, or stretch slightly.
Skin and cheek blobs should have small smooth residual motion.
Jaw and contour blobs may follow small global head motion.
The prompt must be deterministic given the same random seed.

motion_context.motion_type: blink | mouth_open | mouth_close | rigid | residual | contour_shift
